hero.title: Your confident in every important conversation
hero.subtitle: Confident assists you in real-time during video calls. AI suggestions for interviews, sales, and meetings without anyone noticing.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Add Confident to Chrome in seconds
howItWorks.step2Desc: One click in Google Meet, Teams or Zoom
howItWorks.step3Desc: Side panel with what to say at each moment

useCases.title: For every situation
useCases.candidateDesc: Stand out in technical and behavioral interviews. Confident suggests STAR frameworks and structured responses.
useCases.salesDesc: Close more deals. Detect objections, buying signals, and key closing moments.
useCases.defenderDesc: Handle complex meetings. Understand difficult questions and structure clear responses.

features.title: Features
features.realTimeDesc: Claude analyzes the conversation and suggests what to say now
features.multiPlatformDesc: Works on Google Meet, Microsoft Teams and Zoom
features.privateDesc: Text only, we never store audio. GDPR compliant
features.smartCardsDesc: Green, yellow or red depending on the importance of the moment

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you want

pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best suits you

anonymous.name: Anonymous
anonymous.description: Try Confident without creating an account

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For those with frequent critical conversations

waitlist.title: Pro Plan — Waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: Confident Pro will be available soon. Leave your email and you'll be among the first to know.

waitlistSuccess.title: You're on the list! 🎉
waitlistSuccess.subtitle: We'll notify you by email when Confident Pro is available.
waitlistSuccess.freePlanInfo: In the meantime, you can keep using the free plan (15 sessions).

q1.question: Why 15 sessions and not unlimited on the free plan?
q1.answer: We want you to try Confident without commitment, but AI costs (Claude + Deepgram) are significant. 15 sessions are enough to validate if it works for you.

q2.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q2.answer: Yes, without penalty. Cancel from your dashboard at any time.

q3.question: What happens to my data if I cancel?
q3.answer: You can delete them completely from the dashboard or request it at hola@tryconfident.com. We comply with GDPR (ARCO rights).

q4.question: Will there be a team plan?
q4.answer: Yes, we're working on a Teams plan (€49/month for 5 users). If you're interested, write to us at hola@tryconfident.com.

dashboard.title: My sessions
dashboard.noSessions: You don't have any sessions yet
dashboard.noSessionsDesc: Start a video call and activate Confident to see your sessions here

auth.signInSubtitle: Access your dashboard and manage your sessions

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.p1: At Confident we take your privacy very seriously. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, where we store it and what your rights are.
section1.p2: Confident is a Chrome extension that acts as a real-time assistant during Google Meet video calls. We comply with the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

item1.label: Text transcriptions:
item1.text: We convert the audio from your video calls into text to show you real-time suggestions. Transcriptions are stored in our database.

item2.label: Generated suggestions:
item2.text: We save the suggestions that the AI shows you during the session, along with your feedback (👍/👎).

item3.label: Email:
item3.text: If you decide to create an account with Google OAuth, we save your email address to identify you.

item4.label: Device fingerprint:
item4.text: An anonymous identifier generated from your browser characteristics (does NOT include personal information). We use it for the free sessions counter.

item6.label: Usage data (analytics):
item6.text: Anonymous events of how you use the extension (e.g.: "session started", "suggestion shown"). We process them with Posthog EU.

no.title: 2.2 Data we DO NOT collect

banner.title: ✅ Audio NEVER stored
banner.text: The audio from your video calls is processed only in real-time and is never saved on any server. We only save the text resulting from the transcription.

no.item2: We DO NOT access your camera
no.item3: We DO NOT read your emails or personal files
no.item4: We DO NOT track your activity outside of Google Meet

section3.title: 3. How we use your data
section3.intro: We use your data exclusively to:

item1.label: Show you real-time suggestions
item1.text: during your video calls (main purpose of the service).

item2.label: Improve the quality of suggestions
item2.text: by analyzing which suggestions were helpful (based on your 👍/👎 feedback).

item3.label: Send you your session summary by email
item3.text: when it ends (only if you provided your email).

item5.label: Show your session history
item5.text: in the dashboard (only accessible by you).

item6.label: Aggregated and anonymous analytics
item6.text: to improve the product (e.g.: average latency, error rates).

section4.title: 4. Where we store your data

banner.title: 🇪🇺 Data stored in the European Union
banner.text: All your data is stored in Supabase (PostgreSQL) in the Frankfurt, Germany region, complying with GDPR.

section4.text: We do not transfer your data outside the EU except for real-time processing with third-party services (see section 5).

section5.title: 5. Third parties that process data
section5.intro: To offer the service, we temporarily send data to these providers:

deepgram.name: Deepgram (United States)
deepgram.retentionText: They DO NOT store the audio. Real-time processing only.

anthropic.name: Anthropic (United States)
anthropic.retentionText: 30 days according to their enterprise data policy.

resend.name: Resend (United States)
resend.whyText: Send you your session summary by email

posthog.name: Posthog EU (European Union)
posthog.retentionText: Aggregated and anonymous data. EU region.

section6.title: 6. How long we keep your data

item1.label: Transcriptions and suggestions:
item1.text: Indefinitely, until you decide to delete them from your dashboard or request the deletion of your account.

item2.label: Device fingerprint:
item2.text: Until you clear the extension data in Chrome.

item3.label: User account:
item3.text: Until you request the deletion of your account.

section7.title: 7. Your rights (GDPR)
section7.intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

right1.title: ✅ Right of Access
right1.text: You can download all your transcriptions and suggestions from the dashboard at any time.

right2.title: ✅ Right to Rectification
right2.text: If you detect an error in your data, you can request its correction by sending an email to privacy@tryconfident.com

right3.title: ✅ Right to Erasure (Deletion)
right3.text: You can delete individual sessions from the dashboard or request the complete deletion of your account by contacting privacy@tryconfident.com. We will delete all your data within 30 days.

right4.title: ✅ Right to Object
right4.text: You can object to the processing of your data at any time by stopping use of the service.

right5.title: ✅ Right to Data Portability
right5.text: You can export your transcriptions in JSON format from the dashboard.

banner.title: 📧 Data Rights Requests (Access, Rectification, Erasure, Objection)
banner.text: To exercise any of these rights, send an email to privacy@tryconfident.com with the subject "Data Rights Request" and we will respond within a maximum of 30 days.

section8.title: 8. Cookies and Tracking
section8.intro: We use the following tracking technologies:

item1.label: Session cookies (Supabase Auth):
item1.text: To keep your session active. Essential for the service to function.

item2.label: Local Storage (chrome.storage):
item2.text: To save your device fingerprint and local preferences in the extension.

item3.label: Posthog (Analytics):
item3.text: To measure product usage in an aggregated and anonymous way. You can disable tracking by installing an anti-tracking extension.

section9.title: 9. Data security
section9.intro: We implement the following security measures:

item2.label: Encryption at rest:
item2.text: Data in Supabase is encrypted on disk.

item3.label: Row Level Security (RLS):
item3.text: Only you can access your own transcriptions and suggestions.

item4.label: OAuth authentication:
item4.text: We don't store passwords. We use Google OAuth.

item5.label: No XSS:
item5.text: Manual DOM construction to prevent injection attacks.

section10.title: 10. Minors
section10.text: Confident is designed for adults (18+) in professional contexts. We do not knowingly collect data from minors under 16 years old. If we detect that a minor has created an account, we will delete their data immediately.

section11.title: 11. Changes to this policy
section11.text: We may update this Privacy Policy occasionally. We will notify you of significant changes by email (if you have an account) or via a notice in the extension. The "Last updated" date at the top of the document indicates the current version.

section12.title: 12. Contact
section12.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or want to exercise your GDPR rights:

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.p1: By installing, accessing or using the Chrome extension "Confident" (hereinafter, the "Service"), you agree to be legally bound by these Terms of Service (hereinafter, the "Terms").
section1.p2: If you do not agree with these Terms, do not use the Service.

section2.title: 2. Service Description
section2.intro: Confident is a Chrome extension that acts as a real-time assistant during Google Meet video calls. The Service:
section2.item1: Captures the audio from your video call (Google Meet tab + microphone)
section2.item2: Converts the audio to text through automatic transcription
section2.item3: Analyzes the conversation context with artificial intelligence (AI)
section2.item4: Shows real-time suggestions in a side panel
section2.item5: Saves transcriptions and suggestions in your account for later consultation

banner.title: ⚠️ Important: Confident is an assistance tool
banner.text: Suggestions generated by AI are advisory and do not replace your professional judgment. We are not responsible for decisions you make based on the Service's suggestions.

technical.title: 3.1 Technical requirements
technical.intro: To use the Service you need:

age.title: 3.2 Age requirements
age.text: You must be at least 18 years old to use the Service. If you are between 16 and 18 years old, you need the consent of your parents or legal guardians.

banner.title: 🚨 CRITICAL: Participant consent
banner.p1: Before starting a session, you MUST inform all participants that the conversation will be transcribed and obtain their explicit consent.
banner.p2: Failure to comply with this obligation may constitute a violation of privacy and conversation recording laws in your jurisdiction. You are solely responsible for obtaining these consents.

anonymous.title: 4.1 Anonymous Plan (Free)
anonymous.item2: Transcriptions and suggestions are not saved permanently
anonymous.item3: No access to dashboard or history

free.title: 4.2 Free Plan (Google Account)
free.item1: 15 sessions with Google account (includes the 5 anonymous ones)
free.item2: Access to dashboard with session history
free.item4: Automatic email with summary when session ends

pro.title: 4.3 Pro Plan (Paid)
pro.item2: Priority in improvements and new features
pro.note: Note: The Pro Plan is currently on waitlist. Prices and payment terms will be communicated before activation.

acceptable.title: 5.1 You may use the Service for:
acceptable.item1: Assistance in job interviews (as a candidate)
acceptable.item2: Support in commercial calls and sales
acceptable.item3: Help in presentations and project defenses
acceptable.item4: Any other legitimate professional use where you have participant consent

unacceptable.title: 5.2 You may NOT use the Service to:
unacceptable.item1: Record conversations without consent from all participants
unacceptable.item2: Transcribe illegal, offensive content or that violates third party rights
unacceptable.item3: Share or sell other people's transcriptions without their permission
unacceptable.item4: Reverse engineer, modify or attempt to hack the Service
unacceptable.item5: Use the Service to directly compete with us
unacceptable.item6: Overload or damage the Service infrastructure
unacceptable.item7: Circumvent usage limits (e.g.: create multiple fake accounts)

banner.title: ⚠️ Consequences of misuse
banner.text: We reserve the right to suspend or cancel your account immediately if we detect unacceptable use of the Service, without right to refund.

yourContent.title: 6.1 Your content
yourContent.text: You retain all rights to the transcriptions of your conversations. We only store them to show them to you and improve the Service.

ourContent.title: 6.2 Our content
ourContent.intro: Confident, its code, design, brand and all elements of the Service are property of Confident and are protected by intellectual property laws. You may not:
ourContent.item1: Copy, modify or distribute the extension code
ourContent.item2: Use our brand ("Confident") for derivative products
ourContent.item3: Create competing services based on our code or design

section7.title: 7. Limitation of Liability

banner.title: Service "as is"
banner.text: The Service is offered "as is" and "as available", without warranties of any kind, express or implied.

section7.item1: The Service is always available, without interruptions or errors
section7.item2: Transcriptions are 100% accurate (they may contain errors)
section7.item3: AI suggestions are always correct or appropriate
section7.item4: The Service is compatible with future versions of Chrome or Google Meet

exclusion.title: 7.1 Exclusion of damages
exclusion.intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Confident will not be liable for:
exclusion.item1: Direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from use of the Service
exclusion.item2: Loss of job opportunities, sales or projects from following incorrect suggestions
exclusion.item3: Legal problems arising from recording without consent
exclusion.item4: Data loss due to technical failures

note.title: 💡 Use your professional judgment
note.text: Confident is a support tool, not a substitute for your experience and judgment. Always review suggestions before acting.

byYou.title: 8.1 On your part
byYou.intro: You can cancel your account at any time by:
byYou.item2: Requesting deletion of your account at privacy@tryconfident.com

byUs.title: 8.2 On our part
byUs.intro: We may suspend or cancel your account if:
byUs.item1: You violate these Terms of Service
byUs.item2: We detect fraudulent or abusive use
byUs.item4: We decide to discontinue the Service (with 30 days prior notice)

service.title: 9.1 Service modifications
service.text: We reserve the right to modify, suspend or discontinue the Service (or any part of it) at any time, with or without prior notice.

terms.title: 9.2 Modifications to these Terms
terms.intro: We may update these Terms occasionally. We will notify you of significant changes through:
terms.item3: Update to the "Last updated" date at the top of the document
terms.outro: Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.

section10.title: 10. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
section10.p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of Spain and the European Union (GDPR).
section10.p2: Any dispute arising from these Terms will be resolved in the courts of Madrid, Spain, unless consumer protection laws in your country establish another mandatory jurisdiction.

complete.title: 11.1 Complete agreement
complete.text: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy, constitute the complete agreement between you and Confident.

severability.title: 11.2 Severability
severability.text: If any provision of these Terms is deemed invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force.

noWaiver.title: 11.3 No waiver
noWaiver.text: Our failure to exercise any right under these Terms does not constitute a waiver of that right.

section12.title: 12. Contact
section12.intro: If you have questions about these Terms of Service:

acceptance.title: ✅ By using Confident, you confirm that:
acceptance.item1: You have read and understood these Terms of Service
acceptance.item2: You are at least 18 years old or have consent from your parents/guardians
acceptance.item3: You will obtain consent from all participants before transcribing
acceptance.item4: You will use the Service responsibly and legally
acceptance.item5: You accept the limitations of liability described above
